descriptions.signIn: Use your email and password to access this instance.
descriptions.signUp: Create an account for this instance. Email confirmation is not required in v1.

errors.requiredFields: Please fill in all required fields.

notAvailable.title: Invite not available
notAvailable.description: This invite may be expired, revoked, or already used.

bootstrapComplete.title: Bootstrap complete
bootstrapComplete.description: The first instance admin is now configured. You can continue to the board.

joinRequestSubmitted.title: Join request submitted
joinRequestSubmitted.description: Your request is pending admin approval. You will not have access until approved.

openclaw_gateway_defaults_missing.message: No OpenClaw gateway config was provided.

openclaw_gateway_url_missing.hint: Set agentDefaultsPayload.url to a ws:// or wss:// URL.

openclaw_gateway_url_protocol.message: OpenClaw gateway URL must use ws:// or wss://.
openclaw_gateway_url_protocol.hint: Use a websocket URL for agentDefaultsPayload.url.

openclaw_gateway_auth_header_too_short.message: Gateway auth token is too short.
openclaw_gateway_auth_header_too_short.hint: Use the full gateway auth token from ~/.openclaw/openclaw.json.

openclaw_gateway_device_key_generated.message: Generated a persistent gateway device key.

openclaw_gateway_device_key_generate_fai.message: Failed to generate a gateway device key.
openclaw_gateway_device_key_generate_fai.hint: Set agentDefaultsPayload.devicePrivateKeyPem or disable device auth.

openclaw_gateway_paperclip_api_url_proto.message: paperclipApiUrl must use http:// or https://.
openclaw_gateway_paperclip_api_url_proto.hint: Use an HTTP or HTTPS API URL.

openclaw_onboarding_api_loopback.message: The onboarding URL resolves to loopback.
openclaw_onboarding_api_loopback.hint: Use a reachable hostname or IP address.

openclaw_onboarding_private_loopback_bin.message: Paperclip is bound to loopback in authenticated/private mode.
openclaw_onboarding_private_loopback_bin.hint: Use a reachable bind host or the private onboarding helper.

openclaw_onboarding_private_host_not_all.message: The onboarding host is not in the allowed host list.
openclaw_onboarding_private_host_not_all.hint: Allow the host with pnpm paperclipai allowed-hostname <host>.

invite.humanAuthNotice: Sign in or create an account before submitting a human join request.

boardClaim.title: Claim Board ownership
boardClaim.description: This will promote your user to instance admin and migrate company ownership access from local trusted mode.

claimed.title: Board ownership claimed
claimed.description: This instance is now linked to your authenticated user.

signInRequired.title: Sign in required
signInRequired.description: Sign in or create an account, then return to this page to claim Board ownership.

cliAuth.title: Approve Paperclip CLI access
cliAuth.description: A local Paperclip CLI process is requesting board access to this instance.

approved.title: CLI access approved
approved.description: The Paperclip CLI can now finish authentication on the requesting machine.

terminal.description: Start the CLI auth flow again from your terminal to generate a new approval request.

signInRequired.title: Sign in required
signInRequired.description: Sign in or create an account, then return to this page to approve the CLI access request.

errors.updateFailed: Failed to update CLI auth challenge
errors.instanceAdminRequired: This challenge requires instance-admin access. Sign in with an instance admin account to approve it.
